title: Adversarial Defense: Text Summary
scenario: Summarize the article 'The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.' into a one-sentence summary. Consider the constraints of the input article and the desired output. The target LLM output should be the summary.
constraints: Must capture the main idea of the article

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the summary is accurate and captures the main idea of the article.
Check if the summary meets the length constraint.
Check if the summary is coherent and easy to understand.
